sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to strike, to beat, whence פַּעַם an anvil, and פַּעֲמֹון bell, also to strike with the foot, to tread, whence פַּעַם a step, a foot.

(2) Metaph. to impel, to urge any one (used of the Spirit of God), Jud. 13:25 .

Niphal, to be agitated, disturbed, Gen 41:8 Dan 2:3 Psa 77:5.

Hithpael, id. Dan 2:1.

Derivatives, the two nouns immediately following.
